verse.name: v1
verse.lines: More faithful than the sun to rise, the stars to shine, the seasons change You are, You are

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: More certain than the moon to cast a light, the tides to turn again You are, You are

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are faithful Lord never failing friend, unchanging God, Eternal Saviour

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are faithful Lord never wavering Guide, Unending source, ageless creator You are faithful Lord

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: More faithful than our minds could ever comprehend or words define You are, You are

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: More certain than the things we see and then our feelings seem to fade You are, You are

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You are faithful Lord never failing friend, unchanging God, Eternal Saviour

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: You are faithful Lord never wavering Guide, Unending source, ageless creator You are faithful Lord

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: As you have always been, so you will always be

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: The living word, the solid Who holds our hearts in perfect peace

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: You are faithful Lord never failing friend, unchanging God, Eternal Saviour

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: You are faithful Lord never wavering Guide, Unendng source, ageless creator You are faithful Lord
